semantic.role: Infrastructure module providing factory functions for building structured LLM prompts used to drive AI summarization of different artifact types (documents, configuration files, folder indexes, and project overviews).
responsibilities: Generate a prompt string for summarizing a document artifact, using the documentSchema for structured output.
Generate a prompt string for summarizing a configuration file artifact, using the configSchema.
Generate a prompt string for summarizing a directory/folder artifact (L2 aggregation), using the folderSchema.
Generate a prompt string for summarizing a project overview, using the projectSchema.
Allow callers to specify languages for localized output instructions, branch and status for environmental context, and response mode (e.g., json-only).
outOfScope: This module does not handle raw source-code scanning or AST extraction.
It does not execute LLM calls; it only constructs prompts.
It does not manage the lifecycle of prompts beyond generation.
invariants: The module is an infra facade: callers should use these exported functions rather than directly importing internal prompt builder components (as per the infra-facade-imports rule).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: To provide a stable, high-level API for generating prompts that guide LLMs to produce structured summaries of Atlas documentation artifacts.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era. Likely introduced or refined these prompt generator functions as part of the core prompt engine overhaul.

publicSurface.description: Constructs a structured LLM prompt for summarizing a document file; consumes documentSchema and returns a prompt string.
Constructs a structured LLM prompt for summarizing a configuration file; consumes configSchema and returns a prompt string.
Constructs a structured LLM prompt for summarizing a directory (L2 aggregation); consumes folderSchema and returns a prompt string.
Constructs a structured LLM prompt for summarizing a project overview; consumes projectSchema and returns a prompt string.

English.role: Infrastructure module providing factory functions for building structured LLM prompts used to drive AI summarization of different artifact types (documents, configuration files, folder indexes, and project overviews).
responsibilities: Generates a prompt string for summarizing a document artifact, using the documentSchema for structured output.
Generates a prompt string for summarizing a configuration file artifact, using the configSchema.
Generates a prompt string for summarizing a directory/folder artifact (L2 aggregation), using the folderSchema.
Generates a prompt string for summarizing a project overview, using the projectSchema.
Allows callers to specify languages for localized output instructions, branch and status for environmental context, and response mode (e.g., json-only).
outOfScope: This module does not handle raw source-code scanning or AST extraction.
It does not execute LLM calls; it only constructs prompts.
It does not manage the lifecycle of prompts beyond generation.

exports.name: generateDocumentPrompt
exports.signature:
generateDocumentPrompt(
  filePath: string,
  content: string,
  languages: string[] = ['English'],
  branch: string = '',
  status: string = '',
  responseMode: PromptResponseMode = 'json-only',
)

exports.name: generateConfigPrompt
exports.signature:
generateConfigPrompt(
  filePath: string,
  content: string,
  languages: string[] = ['English'],
  branch: string = '',
  status: string = '',
  responseMode: PromptResponseMode = 'json-only',
)

exports.name: generateFolderPrompt
exports.signature:
generateFolderPrompt(
  dirPath: string,
  childrenInfo: string,
  languages: string[] = ['English'],
  branch: string = '',
  status: string = '',
  responseMode: PromptResponseMode = 'json-only',
)

exports.name: generateProjectPrompt
exports.signature:
generateProjectPrompt(
  projectName: string,
  modulesInfo: string,
  languages: string[] = ['English'],
  branch: string = '',
  status: string = '',
  responseMode: PromptResponseMode = 'json-only',
)
